daily_summary.headline: Falcon Heavy and Aurora Show Potential for April 29, 2026

top_events.title: Falcon Heavy | ViaSat-3 F3 (ViaSat-3 Asia-Pacific)
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon Heavy is set to launch the ViaSat-3 F3 satellite, providing significant advancements in satellite broadband capabilities.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for launch and booster landing.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: A Kp index of 4 suggests a potential aurora visible at high latitudes, especially above 65° latitude.
top_events.action: Check local conditions and be ready with camera gear.

top_events.title: Soyuz-5 Demo Flight
top_events.description: The Soyuz-5 rocket is scheduled for a demonstration flight, marking a significant step for Russian space capabilities.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
